text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um, Ayabe? Could we ask you to come along
on our upcoming stargazing session?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
For our independent research assignment,
we made our theme "reach for the stars"
and decided to try some amateur astronomy!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
…Surely you can find someone
more suitable than me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, Curren told us, "Ayabe knows more
about stars than anyone else at this school!"
So obviously you're the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wish she would stop that…
Look, it's just such short notice.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh… I'm sorry! We're so inconsiderate…
All we could think about was how fun it'd be.
Of course you can't…

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I meant… I need to hurry and plan.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want to hear any complaining.
And don't make a racket out there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, okay! We'll make sure not to bother
the neighborhood!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
…Good. I'll let you know when I figure out
what day's clear enough for it.
